productDisplayName: Puma Men Blue Tech Graphic T-shirt
description: Style Note Adopt a winning attitude with this T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes Product Details Blue t-shirt with a round ribbed neck, short sleeves with branding appliqued on the left sleeve and cool print on the left front Material and Care Shell: 100% cotton Rib: 95% cotton and 5% elastane Wash separately in cool water Do not use bleach or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
